pageDescription: Concordia CPE offers full-time, high-quality childcare for preschool children in downtown Montreal.
heroTitle: Concordia CPE, where childhood curiosity becomes confidence.
heroText: Workplace daycare associated with Concordia University, offering full-time, high-quality childcare for preschool children.
heroNote: Priority is given to Concordia University students, staff, and faculty families.
heroImageAlt: Children in a classroom activity at Concordia CPE
storyText1: Founded in 1981, Concordia CPE is located in the Grey Nuns Residence building and serves up to 80 children.
storyText2: CPE Concordia is a non-profit organization governed by a Board of Directors composed primarily of parents. The centre relies on the active involvement of parents and guardians to build a positive relationship between parents, guardians, children and staff.
missionText1: Provide an environment that ensures the child's health and safety.
missionText2: Our program provides opportunities for physical growth, intellectual, social and emotional development emphasizing self-help skills, cooperation, and the building of self-esteem. All staff members are qualified professionals in the field of Early Childhood Education. Professional development is valued and supported by the centre to ensure quality childcare for the children and their families.
missionText3: Create a loving, caring climate that promotes respect for the diversity of culture, race, religion, and ability of others and for the environment.
missionText4: Our educational program acknowledges and encourages learning through play experiences and peer interaction.
missionText5: Ensure active involvement of parents and guardians through frequent communication.
missionText6: The centre relies on active involvement of parents/guardians through frequent communication with staff and parent participation.
bilingualText1: Notre methode: l'apprentissage par le jeu. Nous valorisons une communication constante avec les parents et un environnement chaleureux pour chaque enfant.
bilingualText2: We embrace a welcoming and inclusive environment for families from all backgrounds.
parentsIntro: Our waiting list is managed by La Place 0-5. You can register on their website or by telephone at 514-270-5055. It is important to mention that you are a Concordia University staff or student member when you register.
admissionsText: Our waiting list is managed by an external organization, La Place 0-5. Please contact them directly for more detailed information.
curriculumText: CPE Concordia follows an educational program conform Ministere de la Famille requirements.
faqText: Please consult our list of most frequently asked questions to help parents get answers and more information regarding our CPE.
contactText1: We are located on Concordia University's Sir George Williams campus.
contactNote: For admissions questions, please contact La Place 0-5 directly.
messagePlaceholder: Tell us how we can help...
